articles.title: Recent homes sales in Greater Boston (Mar. 18)
articles.description:
ABINGTON 91 Rice St. One-family ranch, built in 1951, 704 square feet, 4 rooms, 2 bedrooms, 1 bath, on 7,235-square-foot lot. $460,000 ACTON 49 Quarry Road. Condo. $1,200,000 1 Beth Circle. Condo. $500,000 19 Railroad St. #D2 Condo Town House, built in 2006, 910 square feet, 4 rooms, 2 bedrooms, 2 baths. $405,000 19 Railroad […]

The post Recent homes sales in Greater Boston (Mar. 18) appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Abington home at 91 Rice St. sold for $460,000 on March 18.
Acton condos sold for $1,200,000 and $500,000, impacting local market dynamics.
Recent sales indicate rising property values in Greater Boston, affecting affordability.
